---
title: "Code-along exercise: the University of Jelly"
format: html
previous:
  href: "../index.qmd"
  text: "Home"
next:
  href: "code-loading.qmd"
  text: "Load Packages and Data"
---
## Learning outcomes

By the end of this unit, learners will have:

-   loaded data
-   prepared relationships
-   built a network
-   visualised it
-   produced a short example report

::: callout-note
During this exercise you will produce a Quarto report (.qmd file) containing:

title short interpretation (2–3 sentences) network graph
:::

------------------------------------------------------------------------

::: nav-footer
```{=html}
<a href="{{< meta previous.href >}}" aria-label="Go to previous page: {{< meta previous.text >}}">
  <span aria-hidden="true">«</span> {{< meta previous.text >}}
</a>

<a href="{{< meta next.href >}}" aria-label="Go to next page: {{< meta next.text >}}">
  {{< meta next.text >}} <span aria-hidden="true">»</span>
</a>
```
:::
